goal: Close architecture gaps found during BEM-622 internal contour deep audit.

items.fix: Add mandatory Claude-authored smoke response artifact before selecting Claude primary. If absent, selected_provider must be gpt_reserve with blocker/reason.
Add post-trigger delivery verifier that checks curator_hourly_report_state.telegram_delivery=sent and creates alert/report if not sent.

items.gap: Old failed workflow notifications confuse operator
items.fix: Add current-run supersede report and suppress false PASS. Keep stale failures tagged as superseded only after latest workflow static validation.

items.gap: Executor sandbox restrictions caused repeated selftest failures
items.fix: Document executor-safe subset and add preflight linter for task objectives: no exec call, no Exception as e, no forbidden module words.

items.gap: File-based roles can look like live LLM roles
items.fix: Report must explicitly distinguish live provider role vs file-based governance artifact role.
